markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, review pipeline, and discuss strategic planning.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 8 articles are ready for review (4 new, 4 FAQ glossary pages), with a plan to publish the short FAQ pages in a single batch next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Performance:** Organic/referral traffic is up, but growth slowed due to Q4 seasonality. Strong gains continue in the "Policy Enforcement" and "Receipt Chaos" content bets.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Strategic Support:** GrowthX offered to partner on 2026 planning via deep-dive sessions or integration into weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**New Tooling:** GrowthX is developing a new content OS, "Check That," to connect data to actionable opportunities, addressing a key limitation of the current tool, Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Strategy

  - [**Article Review:** 8 articles are ready for review by Joel.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [4 new articles](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [4 FAQ glossary pages (short-form)](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Publishing Plan:** The 4 FAQ pages will be published in a single batch next week to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Outdated Content:** The "Technology and Trends" section in article templates links to outdated, consumer-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Problem:** The template breaks if the section is left empty, forcing the inclusion of irrelevant links.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Decision:** GrowthX will audit the content to recommend a path forward: refresh, repurpose, or remove.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** GrowthX will have a quiet week between Christmas and New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Plan:** Content will be delivered early and pre-scheduled to maintain the publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Performance Update (60-Day View)

  - [**Organic & Referral Traffic:** Sessions are up, but growth has slowed due to Q4 seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Content Bet Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**"Policy Enforcement":** Strongest growth and highest session volume.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**"Receipt Chaos":** Also showing strong growth.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**"Industry Specifics":** New content for "Manufacturing" is starting to generate data.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Declining:** ChatGPT (-3%) and Co-pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Growing:** Claude and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [**Citations:** Fluctuating, currently showing a negative trend.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Context:** This is likely due to a ChatGPT algorithm change in October that cut citations by \~50% for many brands. The current citation rate (avg. 4) is a strong result given this change.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### NGINX Content & Referrals

  - [**Observation:** Joel noted two direct ChatGPT referrals to the NGINX waitlist page.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will investigate which article generated these referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Content Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**This Week:** First content with direct NGINX product references (beyond waitlist CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Last Week:** Content included only NGINX waitlist CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### GrowthX's New Content OS: "Check That"

  - [**Purpose:** A new tool to connect data to actionable opportunities, addressing a key limitation of the current tool, Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Vision:** A central Content OS that integrates:](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [Website page history](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [Analytics & GSC data](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [**Goal:** Provide a clear view of opportunities and the historical impact of content actions.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Aiming for a January launch; GrowthX is seeking design partners for early feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [Audit "Technology and Trends" content to recommend a strategy (refresh, repurpose, or remove).](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Investigate the ChatGPT referrals to the NGINX waitlist page.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Formalize the design partner program for "Check That" and share details with Hotel Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [Review the 8 articles (4 new, 4 FAQ) by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [Implement the conversion-focused changes discussed previously.](https://fathom.video/share/HCXqpNrGt3qQpxh3hkBC-1Xre3BUAZc-?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
